name: MoneyGram
description_short: Tucson, AZ MoneyGram at 850 E Fort Lowell Rd offers check cashing and money transfer services.
description_long:
MoneyGram operates at 850 E Fort Lowell Rd, a standalone location serving the Tucson, AZ community. This Tucson branch is open Monday–Thursday from 9 AM to 7 PM, with extended Friday hours from 9 AM to 8 PM, and Saturday service from 9 AM to 6 PM. The location is closed Sundays.

At this Tucson MoneyGram location, you can cash checks, send money domestically, and access international money transfer services. For specific questions about services or current rates, call 520-628-3643 directly.

Tucson, AZ residents looking for quick check cashing without bank hours restrictions will find this 850 E Fort Lowell Rd location convenient. Bring a valid government-issued ID for any check cashing transaction.
address: 850 E Fort Lowell Rd, Tucson, AZ 85719

company_info.headquarters: 850 E Fort Lowell Rd, Tucson, AZ 85719

pros: Extensive agent network with 28+ locations in Tucson alone, accessible through Walmart and Ace Cash Express
Both online and offline service options for sending and receiving money
Extended hours at many locations, with some Walmart agents open until 11:59 PM
Serves both domestic and international money transfers
Available at convenient retail locations alongside shopping and other errands
No bank account required to use services
Bill payment and money order services available at same locations
cons: No information provided on fees, exchange rates, or transfer costs on the location page
Agent-based model means service quality and availability depends on partner business hours and staffing
Limited to transactional services—does not offer savings accounts, credit products, or financial planning
International transfer rates and processing times not disclosed on website
Requires in-person visits to physical locations for many services, creating time and travel costs
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing quick domestic or international money transfers
Individuals sending money to family members in the US or abroad
People without bank accounts who need bill payment and money order services
Consumers in rural or underserved areas with limited banking infrastructure
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need reliable access to money transfer services and lack traditional bank accounts. The main caveat is that specific pricing and fee information is not disclosed on their location pages, making it essential for consumers to inquire about costs before use, as frequent reliance on money transfer services can become expensive compared to banking alternatives.
services: Location finder and search by address, city, state, or ZIP code
meta_description: MoneyGram in Tucson, AZ at 850 E Fort Lowell Rd. Check cashing and money transfer services available.
